pattern: Meet in the middle: enumerate all subset sums of each half, sort one, and binary search for the partner closest to the goal.
hints: With up to forty elements, enumerating all subsets is too many, but splitting the array in two makes each half small enough to enumerate fully.
Generate every subset sum of the left half and every subset sum of the right half independently.
Sort one list of sums; for each sum in the other, binary search for the value that brings the combined total closest to the goal and track the minimum absolute difference.

edge_inputs.description: whole array hits the goal exactly
goal far below any reachable sum
negatives let sums straddle the goal

stress.description: moderate signed array (capped size so the brute oracle stays fast) with a random goal
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 18))
    nums = [rng.randrange(-10000000, 10000001) for _ in range(n)]
    goal = rng.randrange(-1000000000, 1000000001)
    return [nums, goal]
